MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Sep-09-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT RUSSIAN HILL COURT HOMEOWNER'S ASSOCIATION, INC. MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS

is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts supporting recoverable damages before Defendant's successful completion of allegedly improper foreclosure sale.Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that damages are recoverable pre-foreclosure on any causes of action currently asserted in the complaint. Plaintiff's and Defendant's Requests for Judicial Notice are Granted. Given the recordation action of the Trustee's Deed upon Sale by the senior lienholder Plaintiff's request for injunctive relief against these defendants is moot; given Plaintiff's pending challenge to the validity of the foreclosure by the senior lienholder, any claim for injunctive relief against these defendants is not ripe until Plaintiff prevails on her claims against the senior lienholder and these defendants proceed with foreclosure.

Orders signed.

Judge: Samuel K. Feng; Clerk: K.Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)
